name: @openparachute/surface-monorepo
description: Workspace root for parachute-surface — host module (@openparachute/surface) + shared client library (@openparachute/surface-client).

scripts.build: bun run --filter '@openparachute/surface-client' build && bun run --filter '@openparachute/surface' build
scripts.test: bun test packages/surface-host/src/ packages/surface-client/src/ && bun run --filter "@openparachute/notes-ui" test
scripts.test:all: bun run test && cd web/admin && bun run test
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/surface-host && tsc --noEmit && cd ../surface-client && tsc --noEmit && cd ../notes-ui && tsc -b --noEmit
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run typecheck && bun run typecheck:admin
